title: Spicy Pork Hot Pot
description: A popular Chinese hot pot dish made with tender pork and a spicy broth. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Bring the hot pot broth to a boil in a large pot over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and add the intense chili flakes. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the pork slices to the pot and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
Add the Chinese broccoli and potatoes to the pot. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season with soy sauce to taste, if using.
Serve the hot pot in individual bowls and garnish with chopped green onions.
